text:
* Pete Fritchman (petef@databits.net) wrote:
> Is this still an issue with the latest version of the port?  (There was a 
> patch added three days after this PR was sent in)

I tried again a few days after, but it still bombed. I would have to
set up another CURRENT machine to test, since I moved that machine back
to STABLE on which it did work...

Cheers,
Emiel

"I'd love to go out with you, but the man on television told me to stay
tuned."
